title: mserver5 SIGSEGV, segmentation fault when big table join with other table.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE ODS_PLY_BASE (C_PLY_NO VARCHAR(255), C_VALUE INTEGER, C_DATE DATE);
CREATE TABLE ODS_AGENT (C_CHA_CDE VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, PK_AGENT VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, C_BUSINESS_END_DATE TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ODS_PLY_BASE (C_PLY_NO, C_VALUE, C_DATE) VALUES ('PLY001', 100, DATE('2023-01-01'));
INSERT INTO ODS_AGENT (C_CHA_CDE, PK_AGENT, C_BUSINESS_END_DATE) VALUES ('CHA001', 'AGENT001', TIMESTAMP('2023-12-31 23:59:59'));
SELECT * FROM ODS_PLY_BASE LEFT JOIN ODS_AGENT ON C_PLY_NO = C_CHA_CDE WHERE C_BUSINESS_END_DATE > NOW();
key_bug_features: segmentation fault on large table join operation
